name: Update Sign
desc: Updates a sign's text for all nearby players.

implementation.overview: S33 broadcasts sign text changes to nearby players. Sent by server when C12PacketUpdateSign is processed. No module in the examined client sources directly targets S33.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S33PacketUpdateSign)
modules.purpose: Server sends S33PacketUpdateSign to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
